<!-- design-phase-complete-586 -->

Phase summary: all three prosecution passes ran and one finding was flagged by later passes too.

```yaml
finding_dispositions:
  schema_version: 1
  passes_run: [1, 2, 3]
  entries:
    - finding_id: F1
      pass: 1
      disposition: escalate
      classification: load-bearing
      disposition_rationale: "The finding changes whether the maintainer must make a decision."
      also_flagged_by: [2, 3]
    - finding_id: F2
      pass: 2
      disposition: incorporate
      classification: routine
      disposition_rationale: "The wording correction is reversible and backed by existing docs."
      artifact_citation: "skills/solution-authoring/SKILL.md#rule-non-overridability"
    - finding_id: F3
      pass: 3
      disposition: dismiss
      classification: routine
      disposition_rationale: "The evidence points to an already documented non-goal."
      artifact_citation: "Documents/Design/session-memory-contract.md#non-goals"
```
